title: Silicone Ice Cube Trays CNMTCCO 4 Pack Ice Cube Tray with a Total of 60 compartments, Large Square ice Cubes 3.5 cm for Whiskey, Cocktail, Wine, ice Cream (Black + Silicone Soft lid)
features: 𝗟𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲 𝗜𝗰𝗲 𝗦𝗶𝘇𝗲:Each Ice Cube Tray Contains 15 Cavities With A Total Of 4 Ice Cube Molds 60 Ice Cubes. The Square Ice Cubes Are Perfect For Whiskey, Tequila Or Other Spirit Cocktails. They Melt Slowly And Allow You To Enjoy Your Drinks Longer.4 Ice Cube Molds Enough For Many Summers

𝗘𝗰𝗼-𝗙𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗹𝘆 𝗦𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗲, 𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗧𝗼 𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗻:Our Ice Cube Tray Is Made Of Flexible, Non-Stick And Washable Silicone. It Is Bpa Free And Fda Approved, Which Ensures Safety For Use In The Refrigerator And Microwave. Plus, It Is Easy To Clean And Guaranteed To Be Reusable.

𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗧𝗼 𝗨𝗻𝗹𝗼𝗰𝗸:The Ice Tray Features Raised Sections Between Each Compartment To Separate The Individual Ice Cubes, Making Defrosting A Breeze. Just Gently Press The Bottom To Release The Ice Cubes! Unlike Other Hard Plastic Ice Cube Trays, Our Silicone Elastomer Helps The Ice Cubes To Slide Out And Keep Their Shape After Taking Them Out.

𝗧𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝗔𝗻𝗱 𝗦𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗕𝘂𝗹𝗸𝘆: Our Square Ice Cubes Are A Better Mold Than Other Round Ice Balls. Maximize Freezer Space And Keep Ice Fresh And Odor-Free. The Ice Molds Can Be Neatly Stacked To Efficiently Use The Inside Of The Refrigerator. Besides, A New Silicone Cover Has Been Added To Prevent Both Refrigerator Bacteria And Water Leakage.
